title: The Eternal Skald
description:
An AI-powered storyteller, oracle interpreter, and tactical enemy controller for Ironsworn and Ironsworn: Delve campaigns in Foundry VTT v14, powered by Abacus AI ChatLLM. Just type ! followed by your words to speak with the Skald, or !skald-help for all commands.

v0.21.0 — UX polish & ecosystem ("Phase D"). Adds a guided first-run setup wizard for new GMs, a tabbed settings panel (AI Provider / Narrative / Memory / Advanced), inline command autocomplete as you type !, and an in-game searchable command reference (!commands). All new UI is built on Foundry's modern ApplicationV2 framework, and the docs now ship a full command reference and an adapter-development guide. Every addition is opt-in / default-safe and fully backwards-compatible. Full release history is in CHANGELOG.md.

recommends.reason: Optional but recommended. When the Ironsworn system is active, the Skald integrates with its rules engine to trigger moves, read character state, and narrate official roll outcomes. The module also works standalone in any system, but Ironsworn-specific mechanics are then unavailable.

Optional. When the Nimble system is active, the Skald reads character abilities (STR/DEX/INT/WIL) and resource pools (HP, wounds, mana, hit dice) through a built-in read-only system adapter, so narration is grounded in your real sheet. Map vision and the agnostic chronicle/memory core also work. Nimble support is read-only — the Skald does not yet write to Nimble sheets.
